description_long: This chaise features a modern, minimalist design with a sturdy metal frame and thick, segmented cushions upholstered in a textured, black material. The backrest is tall and divided into three horizontal sections, providing ample support and a visually striking appearance. Both the seat and back cushions are generously padded, with a slightly contoured surface for ergonomic comfort. The armrests are constructed from the same metal as the frame, forming clean, angular lines that extend from the base to the top of the backrest. The legs are integrated into the frame, creating a continuous rectangular loop that enhances stability and adds to the contemporary aesthetic. The upholstery has a subtle, irregular pattern that mimics the look of distressed leather or vinyl, adding depth and character to the overall appearance.
description: A modern chaise with a segmented, padded black backrest and seat, supported by a sleek metal frame with angular armrests and integrated legs. The upholstery features a textured, distressed pattern for added visual interest.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chaise's thick, segmented cushions and the continuous metal frame forming both the armrest and leg.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three-section backrest, wide seat, and symmetrical armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the frame and cushion structure seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full height and width of the backrest, with the segmented cushion design and the rectangular metal frame.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall and segmented into three horizontal, padded sections, each with a slightly contoured surface. It has a modern, geometric appearance with no visible tufting or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has armrests on both sides, constructed from metal and forming straight, angular lines that are integrated with the frame.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are part of a continuous rectangular metal frame that extends from the base to the armrests, giving a modern, minimalist look with no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is black with a subtle, irregular, distressed texture that mimics cracked or aged leather, providing a visually interesting surface.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three large, attached cushions forming the backrest and two thick seat cushions, all aligned in a segmented, horizontal configuration for ergonomic support.
